parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: migration_name
parameters.description: Unique 4-32 character migration name containing letters, digits, hyphens, or underscores.

parameters.name: migration_mode
parameters.description: Migration mode: fully-managed or semi-managed; default is fully-managed.

parameters.name: migration_agent
parameters.description: Connected agent ID required for semi-managed mode; the agent needs at least one available worker.

parameters.name: source_info
parameters.description: Source array: sourceType defaults to S3 and supports S3, OSS, COS, OBS, OOS, or ZOS; endpoint starts with http:// or https://; sourceBucketType defaults to Bucket and supports Bucket, Folder, Files, or Prefix with at most one folder, 100 files, or one prefix.

parameters.name: destination_info
parameters.description: ZOS destination array with an http:// or https:// endpoint, bucket, access key, and secret key.

parameters.name: storage_type
parameters.description: Destination storage: MATCH_RESOURCE, STANDARD, STANDARD_IA, or GLACIER; default is STANDARD. Archived source data must remain restored through migration when matching source storage.

parameters.name: acl_conf
parameters.description: Destination ACL: match-resource, private, or public-read; default is match-resource.

parameters.name: conflict_mode
parameters.description: Same-name handling: OVERWRITE, IGNORE, or COMPARE; default is IGNORE.

parameters.name: migrate_start_time
parameters.description: Lower LastModified bound in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format, from 1970-01-02 through 2037-12-31 and earlier than migrateEndTime.

parameters.name: migrate_end_time
parameters.description: Upper LastModified bound in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format, from 1970-01-02 through 2037-12-31 and later than migrateStartTime; dynamic default is task creation time plus ten years.

examples: ctyun zos migration create --region 81f7728xxxxx0155d307d5b --migration-name aanjyy --migration-mode semi-managed --migration-agent 111_agt_76f7dc8b012xxxxf6ed082db55d08 --source-info '[{"sourceType":"ZOS","sourceEndpoint":"http://xxx","sourceBucket":"cxx-hkpblz-bbt","sourceAccessKey":"xxx","sourceSecretKey":"xxx","sourceBucketType":"Prefix","migrateFolder":[],"migrateFiles":[],"migratePrefix":["ajy"]}]' --destination-info '[{"destinationType":"ZOS","destinationEndpoint":"http://xxx","destinationBucket":"bucket-xxx","destinationAccessKey":"xxx","destinationSecretKey":"xxx"}]' --storage-type STANDARD --acl-conf match-resource --conflict-mode IGNORE --migrate-start-time '2017-12-31 23:59:59' --migrate-end-time '2027-12-31 23:59:59'

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: migration_mode
parameters.description: Migration management mode.

parameters.name: migration_status
parameters.description: Migration status: creating, created, create_failed, starting, waiting, executing, stopping, stopped, restoring, agent_lost, finished, failed, finished_error, retrying, or deleting.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Semi-managed migration agent ID.

parameters.name: search_name
parameters.description: Resource-name search text.

parameters.name: page_no
parameters.description: Page number; default is 1.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.

examples: ctyun zos migration list --region 81f7728xxxxx0155d307d5b --migration-mode fully-managed --migration-status waiting --agent-id 222_agt_80c60304b992616be45d76402 --search-name my --page-no 2 --page-size 3
